name: Execution via Squiblydoo Technique Detected
description: Detects the execution of the Squiblydoo technique, which involves using `scrobj.dll` to execute arbitrary code.

prompts.prompt: Squiblydoo technique detected: Suspicious loading of `scrobj.dll` indicating potential arbitrary code execution. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **Image Loaded** {Image}, **User** {User}, **Computer** {Computer}. Investigate this high-risk activity immediately for signs of malicious code execution and defense evasion.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for Image Load (7).

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The path of the loaded image (scrobj.dll).

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.description: The computer on which the event occurred.
